parts.text: A pull request lands. One question matters: is it clear to merge, or not?
mergegate summary answers it in one glance — who opened it, how many gates passed, and a single headline. Built for a CI job summary or a pull-request comment.

An agent's pull request: four gates, two green, two red — blocked on spec and tests. The same verdict as a one-line markdown badge you post straight on the PR. The agent fixes it, and the digest flips to a clean pass, exit zero.
mergegate. The whole gate, in one line. From deemwar.
